name: Pega_Extensions_CustomKPIGauge
label: Custom KPI Gauge
description: A gauge widget that displays a single numeric value from a configurable data page with colored zones, target marker, trend indicator, and legend

properties.name: minValue
properties.label: Min Value (constant if no Min Field Name)

properties.name: maxValue
properties.label: Max Value (constant if no Max Field Name)

properties.name: thresholdLowPropertyName
properties.label: Low threshold Field Name (dynamic, from data page)

properties.name: thresholdLow
properties.label: Low threshold value (constant if no Low threshold Field Name)

properties.name: thresholdHighPropertyName
properties.label: High threshold Field Name (dynamic, from data page)

properties.name: thresholdHigh
properties.label: High threshold value (constant if no High threshold Field Name)

properties.name: targetValuePropertyName
properties.label: Target value Field Name (dynamic, from data page)

properties.name: targetValue
properties.label: Target value (constant if no Target Field Name)

properties.name: targetLabel
properties.label: Target label (e.g. Target, Goal — leave blank to hide)

properties.name: colorBelowLow
properties.label: Color for Low zone (below low threshold)

properties.name: colorAboveHigh
properties.label: Color for Good zone (at or above high threshold)
